/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Werror -Wall -Wno-error=pragmas -faligned-new -Wno-packed-bitfield-compat -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mcrc32 -O0 -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libphoton.so -o output/libphoton.so
